# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "company/project",
    "description": "Application with automated setup and asset compilation",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "require": {
        "php": "^8.0",
        "symfony/console": "^6.0"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^10.0"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"echo 'Starting post-install setup...\\n';\"",
            "@create-directories",
            "@download-assets",
            "@setup-environment",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@initialize-database",
            "@clear-cache",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Post-install setup completed!\\n';\""
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"echo 'Starting post-update setup...\\n';\"",
            "@download-assets",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@update-database",
            "@clear-cache",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Post-update setup completed!\\n';\""
        ],
        "create-directories": [
            "@php -r \"if (!is_dir('storage/logs')) mkdir('storage/logs', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!is_dir('storage/cache')) mkdir('storage/cache', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!is_dir('storage/uploads')) mkdir('storage/uploads', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!is_dir('public/assets')) mkdir('public/assets', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!is_dir('public/css')) mkdir('public/css', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!is_dir('public/js')) mkdir('public/js', 0755, true);\"",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Created necessary directories\\n';\""
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Assets downloaded successfully\\n';\""
        ],
        "setup-environment": [
            "@php -r \"if (!file_exists('.env') && file_exists('.env.example')) copy('.env.example', '.env');\"",
            "@php scripts/setup-config.php",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Environment configured\\n';\""
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "@php scripts/compile-css.php",
            "@php scripts/compile-js.php",
            "@php scripts/optimize-images.php",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Assets compiled successfully\\n';\""
        ],
        "initialize-database": [
            "@php scripts/create-database.php",
            "@php scripts/run-migrations.php",
            "@php scripts/seed-database.php",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Database initialized\\n';\""
        ],
        "update-database": [
            "@php scripts/run-migrations.php",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Database updated\\n';\""
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "@php -r \"array_map('unlink', glob('storage/cache/*.cache'));\"",
            "@php scripts/clear-cache.php",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Cache cleared\\n';\""
        ],
        "test": [
            "phpunit"
        ],
        "build": [
            "@create-directories",
            "@compile-assets"
        ],
        "deploy": [
            "@build",
            "@clear-cache"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "post-install-cmd": "Run automated setup tasks after composer install",
        "post-update-cmd": "Run automated update tasks after composer update",
        "create-directories": "Create necessary application directories",
        "download-assets": "Download external assets and dependencies",
        "setup-environment": "Setup environment configuration files",
        "compile-assets": "Compile and optimize CSS, JS, and images",
        "initialize-database": "Initialize database with migrations and seeds",
        "update-database": "Run database migrations",
        "clear-cache": "Clear application cache files",
        "test": "Run test suite",
        "build": "Build application assets",
        "deploy": "Prepare application for deployment"
    },
    "config": {
        "process-timeout": 600,
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "sort-packages": true
    },
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true
}
